message:
feat: Add toon_rust integration for enhanced terminal output

- Updated Cargo.toml with toon_rust dependency
- Updated Cargo.lock with new dependencies
- Enhanced CLI output formatting in cli.rs
- Added toon-powered output to main.rs for richer terminal displays

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
